highlights.text: Hanoi (2N) → Halong Bay (2N) → Da Nang/Hoi An (3N) highlights circuit
Hanoi city highlights & historic Old Quarter
Halong Bay ultra-luxury cruise through limestone karsts
Hoi An lantern-lit streets & beachfront farewell gala

itinerary.title: Vietnam Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An Ancient Town • Da Nang Beaches
itinerary.overview: Discover the absolute highlights of Vietnam with TRAGUIN's curated family expedition. This comprehensive 8-day journey takes your family through the vibrant capital of Hanoi, the serene majesty of Halong Bay, and the cultural charm of Hoi An and Da Nang — creating unforgettable memories across Vietnam's iconic landscapes.
itinerary.seo_title: VN-002 | Vietnam Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Vietnam family highlights package (VN-002): Hanoi, Halong Bay, Hoi An Ancient Town, and Da Nang beaches.

highlights.text: Hoi An Ancient Town Lantern Streets

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure in the historic Old Quarter.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private hotel transfer
Overnight Stay: Hanoi (Premium Heritage Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Hanoi Highlights
days.description: A comprehensive city tour covering Hanoi's most famous landmarks, providing a rich educational experience for your family.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Guided Hanoi city tour
Overnight Stay: Hanoi (Premium Heritage Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Halong Bay Cruise
days.description: Travel to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel for an extraordinary journey through the limestone islands with gourmet dining.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Transfer to Halong Bay, ultra-luxury cruise boarding
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Ultra-Luxury Cruise)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Cruise Dinner

days.title: Halong Bay Adventure
days.description: Explore hidden caves and enjoy guided activities on the water. A day filled with unforgettable memories and stunning views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cave exploration, water activities, sunset deck views
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Ultra-Luxury Cruise)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Cruise Dining

days.title: Flight to Da Nang & Hoi An
days.description: Morning cruise brunch. Transfer to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Check into your luxury coastal family resort in Hoi An.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cruise brunch, domestic flight to Da Nang, resort transfer
Overnight Stay: Hoi An/Da Nang (Luxury Coastal Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Cruise Brunch

days.title: Hoi An Ancient Town
days.description: A guided tour of Hoi An's Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its charming architecture, night markets, and traditional lanterns.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Hoi An Ancient Town guided tour
Overnight Stay: Hoi An/Da Nang (Luxury Coastal Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Coastal Leisure & Celebration
days.description: A relaxing day at the resort, followed by a grand farewell dinner gala at a beachfront restaurant — an exclusive experience for the family.
activities: Evening Experience: Grand farewell dinner gala
Overnight Stay: Hoi An/Da Nang (Luxury Coastal Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Vietnam journey.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in handpicked premium family stays across Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Hoi An/Da Nang (highlights route)
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers
Domestic flight Da Nang sector and Halong Bay ultra-luxury cruise
Guided Hanoi city tour and Hoi An Ancient Town visit
Halong Bay cave exploration and onboard activities
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Vietnam entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
